sql: DELETE FROM container_restarts WHERE host_name = ? AND name = ?
UPDATE operation_steps SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE operation_id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
INSERT INTO tokens (id, username, name, token_hash, expires_at, scope_paths, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

UPDATE storage_pools SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tokens SET last_used_at = ? WHERE id = ?
UPDATE hosts SET role = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

INSERT INTO user_2fa (username, method, secret, label, enrolled_at, updated_at, epoch)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
			 ON CONFLICT(username, method, label) DO UPDATE
			   SET secret = excluded.secret, updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
			       deleted_at = NULL, last_step = 0, epoch = excluded.epoch

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO notification_routes (id, event_pattern, target_id, min_severity, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)

INSERT INTO lb_backends (lb_name, name, address, is_vm, vm_name, enabled, updated_at, generation)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
			 ON CONFLICT(lb_name, name) DO UPDATE SET
			   address = excluded.address,
			   is_vm = excluded.is_vm,
			   vm_name = excluded.vm_name,
			   enabled = excluded.enabled,
			   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
			   generation = COALESCE(NULLIF(excluded.generation, ''), lb_backends.generation),
			   deleted_at = NULL
UPDATE hosts SET labels = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

INSERT INTO sessions
		 (id, username, realm, ip, user_agent, created_at, last_used_at, expires_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO fencing_log (id, host_name, method, result, timestamp, detail)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE hosts SET version = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

INSERT INTO vm_backups (vm_name, disk_name, repo, total_bytes, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(vm_name, disk_name, repo) DO UPDATE SET
		   total_bytes = excluded.total_bytes,
		   updated_at  = excluded.updated_at
UPDATE vms SET spec = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT INTO hosts (name, address, ssh_user, ssh_port, grpc_port, state, cert_serial,
			cpu_total, mem_total, disk_total, fence_strategy, version, role, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

UPDATE hosts SET cpu_total = ?, mem_total = ?, disk_total = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE name = ?
UPDATE hosts SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

UPDATE replication_checkpoints SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
			 WHERE vm_name = ? AND repo = ?
UPDATE host_firewall_rules SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

INSERT INTO ip_allocations (network, ip, mac, vm_name, owner_kind, owner_host, allocated_at, updated_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
			 ON CONFLICT(network, ip) DO UPDATE SET
			   mac = excluded.mac, vm_name = excluded.vm_name, owner_kind = excluded.owner_kind,
			   owner_host = excluded.owner_host, allocated_at = excluded.allocated_at,
			   updated_at = excluded.updated_at, deleted_at = NULL
			 WHERE ip_allocations.deleted_at IS NOT NULL

UPDATE user_2fa SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
			 WHERE username = ? AND method = ? AND COALESCE(label,'') = ?
UPDATE image_hosts SET progress_pct = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE image_name = ? AND host_name = ?
UPDATE recovery_code_sets SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE username = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE recovery_codes SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
			 WHERE username = ? AND used_at IS NULL AND set_id != ?
INSERT INTO users (username, role, password_hash, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO role_bindings (id, path, role, principal, propagate, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO host_runtime_usage (host_name, disk_iops, net_mbps, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(host_name) DO UPDATE SET
		   disk_iops = excluded.disk_iops,
		   net_mbps = excluded.net_mbps,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at

INSERT INTO containers (host_name, name, state, image, cpu_limit, memory_mib, labels, restart_policy, state_detail, project, is_template, on_host_failure, create_spec, relocate_token, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(host_name, name) DO UPDATE SET
		   state = excluded.state,
		   image = excluded.image,
		   cpu_limit = excluded.cpu_limit,
		   memory_mib = excluded.memory_mib,
		   labels = excluded.labels,
		   restart_policy = excluded.restart_policy,
		   state_detail = excluded.state_detail,
		   project = excluded.project,
		   is_template = excluded.is_template,
		   on_host_failure = excluded.on_host_failure,
		   -- Keep an existing create_spec when the caller didn't supply one, so a
		   -- generic upsert can't wipe the create-time intent (it's "current
		   -- intent", forward-only).
		   create_spec = CASE WHEN excluded.create_spec <> '' THEN excluded.create_spec ELSE create_spec END,
		   relocate_token = excluded.relocate_token,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
		   deleted_at = NULL

INSERT INTO user_2fa_sets (username, active_epoch, updated_at)
				 VALUES (?, ?, ?)
				 ON CONFLICT(username) DO UPDATE SET
				   active_epoch = excluded.active_epoch,
				   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
				   deleted_at = NULL

INSERT INTO registry_credentials
			       (id, scope, owner, registry, username, secret, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
			       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
UPDATE role_bindings SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?
UPDATE snapshots SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE vm_name = ? AND name = ?
UPDATE hosts SET region = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO operations (id, method, principal, project, resource_kind, resource_id,
	operation_kind, request_hash, idempotency_key, reservation_json, desired_ref,
	vm_owner_epoch, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
UPDATE sessions SET last_used_at = ? WHERE id = ? AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE resource_mappings SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?
UPDATE vm_interfaces SET network_name = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE network_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE vm_interfaces SET vm_name = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE vm_name = ?

UPDATE containers SET state = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE runtime_action_proofs SET status = 'failed', result_code = ?, result_detail = ?,
		        completed_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		        WHERE id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN ('prepared','in_progress')

UPDATE vm_disks SET host_name = ?, path = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE vm_name = ? AND disk_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE service_endpoints SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE service_name = ? AND ip = ?

UPDATE backup_schedules
		 SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE vm_name = ? AND repo = ?

INSERT INTO firewall_defaults (scope, default_deny, stack_name, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
		 ON CONFLICT(scope) DO UPDATE SET default_deny = excluded.default_deny,
		   stack_name = excluded.stack_name, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, deleted_at = NULL
UPDATE vms SET name = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

UPDATE runtime_action_proofs
		    SET status = 'completed', executor_host = ?, completed_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		  WHERE id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN ('prepared','in_progress')

INSERT INTO vm_restarts (vm_name, attempt_count, window_start, last_restart, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, 0, ?, NULL, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(vm_name) DO UPDATE SET
		   attempt_count = 0,
		   window_start = excluded.window_start,
		   last_restart = NULL,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at

UPDATE vms SET host_name = ?, state = 'pending', pending_action_id = ?, updated_at = ?
		        WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT INTO host_firewall_rules
		   (id, host_name, direction, proto, port_range, cidr, action, priority, comment, stack_name, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE vm_disks SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE vm_name = ? AND disk_name = ?

INSERT INTO cluster_firewall_rules
		   (id, direction, proto, port_range, cidr, action, priority, comment, stack_name, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

UPDATE hosts SET state = ?, version = COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), version), schema_version = ?,
				cpu_total = ?, mem_total = ?, disk_total = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO project_authority_epochs
		      (project, authority_epoch, holder, transfer_kind, fence_proof_ref, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)

UPDATE registry_credentials SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE scope = ? AND owner = ? AND registry = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE ip_allocations SET vm_name = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE vm_name = ?

INSERT INTO lb_backends (lb_name, name, address, enabled, updated_at, deleted_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, '', 0, ?, ?)
			 ON CONFLICT(lb_name, name) DO UPDATE SET
			   deleted_at = excluded.deleted_at,
			   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
			   enabled = 0
DELETE FROM vm_disks WHERE vm_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL
UPDATE resource_mappings SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ? AND host_name = ? AND address = ?
UPDATE stacks SET state = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT INTO vm_restarts (vm_name, attempt_count, window_start, last_restart, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, 1, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(vm_name) DO UPDATE SET
		   attempt_count = vm_restarts.attempt_count + 1,
		   last_restart = excluded.last_restart,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at

INSERT INTO vms (name, stack_name, host_name, spec, state, state_detail,
				cpu_actual, mem_actual, project, is_template, created_at, updated_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

UPDATE rebalance_proposals SET status='failed', detail='execution timed out', updated_at=?
		 WHERE status='applying' AND updated_at < ?

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO operation_steps (operation_id, owner_epoch, step_name, facts, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)

UPDATE ip_allocations SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE network = ? AND vm_name = ? AND owner_kind = ? AND owner_host = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
DELETE FROM vm_events WHERE host_name = ? AND result = 'error' AND ts < ?
UPDATE firewall_defaults SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE scope = ?
UPDATE rebalance_proposals SET status='approved', updated_at=? WHERE id=? AND status='pending'

UPDATE containers SET is_template = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT INTO networks (name, stack_name, type, config, project, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(name) DO UPDATE SET
		   stack_name = excluded.stack_name,
		   type = excluded.type,
		   config = excluded.config,
		   project = excluded.project,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
		   deleted_at = NULL

UPDATE recovery_codes SET used_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE username = ? AND code_hash = ? AND used_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
		   AND set_id = (SELECT active_set_id FROM recovery_code_sets
		                 WHERE username = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL)

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO host_health (observer, target, status, consecutive_failures, last_seen, updated_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, 0, ?, ?)
UPDATE backup_repos SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE stack_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO vm_events
		   (id, vm_name, host_name, type, result, severity, detail, username, ts)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE lb_backends SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?, enabled = 0 WHERE lb_name = ?

UPDATE containers SET state = ?, state_detail = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE vm_disks SET host_name = ?, updated_at = ?
			      WHERE vm_name = ? AND disk_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE host_health SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE observer = ? OR target = ?

UPDATE vms SET active_operation_id = '', updated_at = ?
		       WHERE name = ? AND active_operation_id = ? AND vm_owner_epoch = ? AND spec_generation = ?
UPDATE vm_interfaces SET ip = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE vm_name = ? AND network_name = ?

INSERT INTO ip_allocations (network, ip, mac, vm_name, owner_kind, owner_host, allocated_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 'ct', ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(network, ip) DO UPDATE SET
		   mac = excluded.mac, vm_name = excluded.vm_name, owner_kind = excluded.owner_kind,
		   owner_host = excluded.owner_host, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, deleted_at = NULL
		 WHERE ip_allocations.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
		    OR (ip_allocations.owner_kind = 'ct'
		        AND ip_allocations.vm_name = excluded.vm_name
		        AND ip_allocations.owner_host = excluded.owner_host)
UPDATE network_vteps SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE host_name = ?
UPDATE dns_records SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?
UPDATE ip_allocations SET network = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE network = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE user_2fa_sets SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
			 WHERE username = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
			   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_2fa f
			                   WHERE f.username = user_2fa_sets.username
			                     AND f.deleted_at IS NULL
			                     AND f.epoch = user_2fa_sets.active_epoch)

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO project_authority_epochs
		      (project, authority_epoch, holder, transfer_kind, fence_proof_ref, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		      VALUES (?, 1, ?, 'initial', '', ?, ?, NULL)
UPDATE recovery_codes SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE username = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE lb_configs SET hosts = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (hosts IS NULL OR hosts IN ('', '[]', 'null'))

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO resource_mappings (name, host_name, address, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, '', '', ?, ?, ?, NULL)

INSERT INTO leader_election (key, holder, expires_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES ('failover', ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE
		   SET holder = excluded.holder,
		       expires_at = excluded.expires_at,
		       updated_at = excluded.updated_at
		   WHERE leader_election.expires_at < ?
		      OR leader_election.holder = excluded.holder

UPDATE rebalance_proposals
		 SET status = 'rejected', detail = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE id = ? AND status = 'pending'

INSERT INTO vm_disks (vm_name, disk_name, host_name, path, size_bytes,
				backing_image, storage_type, storage_volume, target_dev, backing_disk, updated_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE vms SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO image_hosts (image_name, host_name, path, status, pulled_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE sg_rules SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE sg_id = ?
UPDATE rebalance_proposals SET status='failed', detail=?, updated_at=? WHERE id=?
UPDATE audit_log SET prev_hash = ?, content_hash = ? WHERE id = ?

UPDATE vms SET state = 'running', pending_action_id = '', updated_at = ?
		        WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL AND pending_action_id = ?

INSERT INTO stacks (name, compose_hash, compose_yaml, state, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(name) DO UPDATE SET
		   compose_hash = excluded.compose_hash,
		   compose_yaml = excluded.compose_yaml,
		   state        = excluded.state,
		   updated_at   = excluded.updated_at,
		   deleted_at   = NULL

UPDATE vms SET spec = ?, spec_generation = spec_generation + 1, updated_at = ?
			 WHERE name = ? AND spec_generation = ? AND active_operation_id = '' AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE user_2fa SET last_step = ?, last_used_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE username = ? AND method = ? AND COALESCE(label,'') = ? AND secret = ?
		   AND last_step < ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
		   AND epoch = (SELECT active_epoch FROM user_2fa_sets
		                WHERE username = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL)

UPDATE host_pci_devices SET vm_name = NULL, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE vm_name = ?

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO operation_steps (operation_id, owner_epoch, step_name, facts, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		       VALUES (?, ?, ?, '', ?, ?, NULL)

INSERT INTO host_pci_devices
		   (host_name, address, vendor_id, device_id, vendor_name, device_name,
		    type, iommu_group, sriov_capable, sriov_vfs_total, sriov_vfs_free,
		    driver, vm_name, numa_node, pcie_root_port, pcie_bridge, link_clique,
		    link_peers, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
		 ON CONFLICT(host_name, address) DO UPDATE SET
		    vendor_id       = excluded.vendor_id,
		    device_id       = excluded.device_id,
		    vendor_name     = excluded.vendor_name,
		    device_name     = excluded.device_name,
		    type            = excluded.type,
		    iommu_group     = excluded.iommu_group,
		    sriov_capable   = excluded.sriov_capable,
		    sriov_vfs_total = excluded.sriov_vfs_total,
		    sriov_vfs_free  = excluded.sriov_vfs_free,
		    driver          = excluded.driver,
		    numa_node       = excluded.numa_node,
		    pcie_root_port  = excluded.pcie_root_port,
		    pcie_bridge     = excluded.pcie_bridge,
		    link_clique     = excluded.link_clique,
		    link_peers      = excluded.link_peers,
		    updated_at      = excluded.updated_at,
		    deleted_at      = NULL

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO host_pci_devices
		 (host_name, address, vendor_id, device_id, vendor_name, device_name,
		  type, iommu_group, sriov_capable, sriov_vfs_total, sriov_vfs_free,
		  driver, vm_name, numa_node, pcie_root_port, pcie_bridge, link_clique,
		  link_peers, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
UPDATE tokens SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

UPDATE host_pci_devices SET vm_name = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND address = ?
UPDATE user_2fa_sets SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE username = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO audit_log
		   (id, timestamp, username, host_name, action, target, detail, result, prev_hash, content_hash)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO vm_interfaces (vm_name, network_name, ordinal, mac, ip, tap_device, security_groups, updated_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO container_backups (ct_name, repo, total_bytes, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(ct_name, repo) DO UPDATE SET
		   total_bytes = excluded.total_bytes,
		   updated_at  = excluded.updated_at

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO container_snapshots
		   (id, ct_name, host_name, name, state, size_bytes, type, path, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE vm_interfaces SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE vm_name = ?

INSERT INTO leader_election (key, holder, expires_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE
		   SET holder = excluded.holder,
		       expires_at = excluded.expires_at,
		       updated_at = excluded.updated_at
		   WHERE leader_election.expires_at < ?
		      OR leader_election.holder = excluded.holder

UPDATE vm_disks SET host_name = ?, path = ?, storage_type = ?, storage_volume = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE vm_name = ? AND disk_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO storage_pools
			(host_name, name, driver, source, target, options, project, total_bytes, used_bytes, state, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
UPDATE lb_configs SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?, enabled = 0 WHERE name = ?
DELETE FROM vm_locks WHERE vm_name = ? AND holder = ?
UPDATE user_2fa SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE username = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE container_interfaces SET ip = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND ct_name = ? AND ordinal = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE runtime_action_proofs
		    SET status = 'in_progress',
		        executor_host = ?,
		        started_at = CASE WHEN started_at = '' THEN ? ELSE started_at END,
		        updated_at = ?
		  WHERE id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN ('prepared','in_progress')
		    AND (executor_host = '' OR executor_host = ?)

INSERT INTO replication_checkpoints (vm_name, repo, checkpoint, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
		 ON CONFLICT(vm_name, repo) DO UPDATE SET checkpoint = excluded.checkpoint,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at, deleted_at = NULL

INSERT INTO roles (name, verbs, description, built_in, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(name) DO UPDATE
		   SET verbs = excluded.verbs,
		       description = excluded.description,
		       built_in = excluded.built_in,
		       updated_at = excluded.updated_at
UPDATE vm_interfaces SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE vm_name = ? AND mac = ?

UPDATE vm_disks SET size_bytes = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE vm_name = ? AND disk_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
DELETE FROM vm_events WHERE host_name = ? AND result != 'error' AND ts < ?

INSERT INTO rebalance_proposals
			(id, vm_name, src_host, dst_host, policy, expected_gain, status,
			 proposed_at, expires_at, detail, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'pending', ?, ?, ?, ?)
DELETE FROM vm_interfaces WHERE vm_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO vm_interfaces
		 (vm_name, network_name, ordinal, mac, ip, tap_device, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
UPDATE lb_backends SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?, enabled = 0 WHERE lb_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO containers
		 (host_name, name, state, image, cpu_limit, memory_mib, labels, restart_policy, state_detail, project, is_template, on_host_failure, create_spec, relocate_token, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, 'running', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
UPDATE images SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

INSERT INTO backup_schedules
		   (vm_name, pool_name, project_name, scope, repo, cron, keep_last, keep_daily, keep_weekly, keep_monthly, keep_yearly, enabled, type, target_pool, target_host, keep_replicas, incremental, auto_promote, last_checkpoint, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
		 ON CONFLICT(vm_name, repo) DO UPDATE SET
		   pool_name = excluded.pool_name,
		   project_name = excluded.project_name,
		   scope = excluded.scope,
		   cron = excluded.cron,
		   keep_last = excluded.keep_last,
		   keep_daily = excluded.keep_daily,
		   keep_weekly = excluded.keep_weekly,
		   keep_monthly = excluded.keep_monthly,
		   keep_yearly = excluded.keep_yearly,
		   enabled = excluded.enabled,
		   type = excluded.type,
		   target_pool = excluded.target_pool,
		   target_host = excluded.target_host,
		   keep_replicas = excluded.keep_replicas,
		   incremental = excluded.incremental,
		   auto_promote = excluded.auto_promote,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
		   deleted_at = NULL

UPDATE vm_disks SET storage_type = ?, storage_volume = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE vm_name = ? AND disk_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE host_pci_devices SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND address = ?

UPDATE containers SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND name = ?

INSERT INTO vm_locks (vm_name, holder, expires_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(vm_name) DO UPDATE
		   SET holder = excluded.holder,
		       expires_at = excluded.expires_at,
		       updated_at = excluded.updated_at
		   WHERE vm_locks.expires_at < ?
		      OR vm_locks.holder = excluded.holder

UPDATE backup_schedules
		 SET last_run_at = ?, last_run_err = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE vm_name = ? AND repo = ?
UPDATE hosts SET state = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

INSERT OR IGNORE INTO runtime_action_proofs
	(id, action, target_kind, target_name, dest_host, coordinator, lease_holder, lease_expires_at,
	 quorum_live, quorum_needed, owner_epoch, fence_epoch, relocation_token,
	 status, step_state, result_code, result_detail, started_at, completed_at, executor_host,
	 created_at, updated_at)
	VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'prepared', '', '', '', '', '', '', ?, ?)
UPDATE notification_routes SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?
UPDATE networks SET name = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO host_health (observer, target, status, consecutive_failures, last_seen, updated_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO backup_repos (name, path, stack_name, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
		 ON CONFLICT(name) DO UPDATE SET path = excluded.path,
		   stack_name = excluded.stack_name, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, deleted_at = NULL
UPDATE security_groups SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

UPDATE vm_disks SET path = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE vm_name = ? AND disk_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE roles SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?
UPDATE image_hosts SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE image_name = ?
UPDATE vms SET state = ?, state_detail = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?
UPDATE role_bindings SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE (principal = ? OR principal = ?) AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE ip_allocations SET owner_host = ?, allocated_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE owner_kind = 'ct' AND owner_host = ? AND vm_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
DELETE FROM vm_restarts WHERE vm_name = ?

UPDATE ip_allocations SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE owner_kind = 'ct' AND owner_host = ? AND vm_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE container_snapshots SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND ct_name = ? AND name = ?

UPDATE host_pci_devices SET vm_name = '', updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND address = ? AND vm_name = ?
UPDATE vm_disks SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE vm_name = ?

INSERT INTO lb_configs (name, stack_name, vip, algorithm, hosts, ports, enabled, updated_at, generation)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
			 ON CONFLICT(name) DO UPDATE SET
			   stack_name = excluded.stack_name,
			   vip = excluded.vip,
			   algorithm = excluded.algorithm,
			   hosts = excluded.hosts,
			   ports = excluded.ports,
			   enabled = excluded.enabled,
			   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
			   generation = COALESCE(NULLIF(excluded.generation, ''), lb_configs.generation),
			   deleted_at = NULL
UPDATE operations SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT INTO container_restarts (host_name, name, attempt_count, window_start, last_restart, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, 0, ?, NULL, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(host_name, name) DO UPDATE SET
		   attempt_count = 0,
		   window_start = excluded.window_start,
		   last_restart = NULL,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO vm_disks
		 (vm_name, disk_name, host_name, path, size_bytes, backing_image,
		  storage_type, storage_volume, target_dev, backing_disk, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
UPDATE cluster_firewall_rules SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO container_interfaces
		 (host_name, ct_name, network_name, ordinal, mac, ip, veth_device, security_groups, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
UPDATE network_vteps SET network_name = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE network_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE rebalance_proposals SET status='applying', updated_at=?
		 WHERE id=? AND status='approved'
UPDATE vm_disks SET vm_name = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE vm_name = ?

INSERT INTO recovery_codes (username, code_hash, created_at, set_id, updated_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
			 ON CONFLICT(username, code_hash) DO UPDATE SET
			   set_id = excluded.set_id, used_at = NULL,
			   deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO images (name, format, source_url, checksum, size_bytes, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

UPDATE user_2fa SET last_used_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE username = ? AND method = ? AND COALESCE(label,'') = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
		   AND epoch = (SELECT active_epoch FROM user_2fa_sets
		                WHERE username = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL)

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO snapshots (id, vm_name, host_name, name, state, size_bytes, type, vmstate_path, vmstate_size_bytes, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
DELETE FROM vms WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL

UPDATE vms SET spec = ?, spec_generation = spec_generation + 1, active_operation_id = ?, updated_at = ?
		       WHERE name = ? AND active_operation_id = '' AND vm_owner_epoch = ? AND spec_generation = ?
UPDATE notification_targets SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO notification_targets (id, name, type, config, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)

UPDATE containers SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE vms SET state = 'error', state_detail = ?, pending_action_id = '', updated_at = ?
			       WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL AND pending_action_id = ?

INSERT INTO projects (name, display, parent_name, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE container_interfaces SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE host_name = ? AND ct_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO clock_skew (observer, target, skew_seconds, updated_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE vms SET host_name = ?, state = ?, state_detail = '', updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?
UPDATE image_hosts SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE image_name = ? AND host_name = ?

INSERT INTO operation_steps (operation_id, owner_epoch, step_name, facts, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)

INSERT INTO recovery_code_sets (username, active_set_id, updated_at)
			 VALUES (?, ?, ?)
			 ON CONFLICT(username) DO UPDATE SET
			   active_set_id = excluded.active_set_id,
			   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
			   deleted_at = NULL

UPDATE rebalance_proposals SET status='applied', applied_at=?, updated_at=?
		 WHERE id=? AND status='applying'
UPDATE projects SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

INSERT INTO ip_sets (id, name, cidrs, stack_name, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

UPDATE runtime_action_proofs
		    SET step_state = TRIM(COALESCE(step_state,'') || ' ' || ?), updated_at = ?
		  WHERE id = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
		    AND status NOT IN ('completed','failed')
		    AND instr(' ' || COALESCE(step_state,'') || ' ', ' ' || ? || ' ') = 0

INSERT INTO network_vteps (network_name, host_name, vtep_ip, vni, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(network_name, host_name) DO UPDATE SET
		   vtep_ip = excluded.vtep_ip,
		   vni = excluded.vni,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
		   deleted_at = NULL
UPDATE users SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE username = ?
UPDATE ip_sets SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?
UPDATE users SET role = ?, password_hash = ?, deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = ? WHERE username = ?

INSERT INTO project_quotas
		   (project_name, vcpu_limit, mem_mib_limit, disk_gib_limit,
		    nic_limit, public_ip_limit, backup_gib_limit, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(project_name) DO UPDATE SET
		   vcpu_limit       = excluded.vcpu_limit,
		   mem_mib_limit    = excluded.mem_mib_limit,
		   disk_gib_limit   = excluded.disk_gib_limit,
		   nic_limit        = excluded.nic_limit,
		   public_ip_limit  = excluded.public_ip_limit,
		   backup_gib_limit = excluded.backup_gib_limit,
		   updated_at       = excluded.updated_at

UPDATE vm_interfaces SET security_groups = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE vm_name = ? AND network_name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO resource_mappings (name, host_name, address, vendor, device, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)

INSERT INTO service_endpoints (service_name, ip, region, weight, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)
		 ON CONFLICT(service_name, ip) DO UPDATE SET
		   region     = excluded.region,
		   weight     = excluded.weight,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at,
		   deleted_at = NULL

UPDATE rebalance_proposals
		 SET status = 'expired', updated_at = ?
		 WHERE status = 'pending' AND expires_at < ?

INSERT INTO security_groups (id, name, stack_name, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO container_restarts (host_name, name, attempt_count, window_start, last_restart, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, 1, ?, ?, ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(host_name, name) DO UPDATE SET
		   attempt_count = container_restarts.attempt_count + 1,
		   last_restart = excluded.last_restart,
		   updated_at = excluded.updated_at
UPDATE stacks SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ?, state = 'deleted' WHERE name = ?
UPDATE sg_rules SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?
UPDATE networks SET deleted_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL

INSERT INTO operations (id, method, principal, project, resource_kind, resource_id,
	operation_kind, request_hash, idempotency_key, reservation_json, desired_ref,
	vm_owner_epoch, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL)

INSERT INTO dns_records (name, type, value, source, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, 'A', ?, 'auto', ?)
		 ON CONFLICT(name) DO UPDATE SET value=excluded.value, updated_at=excluded.updated_at, deleted_at=NULL

INSERT INTO sg_rules (id, sg_id, direction, proto, port_range, cidr, action, priority, created_at, updated_at)
		 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE sessions SET revoked_at = ? WHERE id = ? AND revoked_at IS NULL

UPDATE runtime_action_proofs SET status = 'completed', executor_host = ?, completed_at = ?, updated_at = ?
		        WHERE id = ?
UPDATE users SET password_hash = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE username = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE vms SET name = ?, spec = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?

UPDATE host_pci_devices SET vm_name = ?, updated_at = ?
		 WHERE host_name = ? AND address = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
		   AND (vm_name IS NULL OR vm_name = '')
UPDATE vms SET is_template = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE hosts SET state = ?, version = COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), version), schema_version = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE name = ?
